description: Checkatrade is a UK-based online platform that helps homeowners find and contact tradespeople for home improvement, repair, and maintenance work. It also provides affiliate-facing APIs for submitting and validating jobs and related lookup operations.
summary: Checkatrade exposes a documented HTTP Affiliate Job API authenticated with an assigned key+shared-secret HTTP Signature scheme, plus a public MCP server at `https://api.checkatrade.com/v1/chatgpt-mcp-server/mcp` over SSE.
